_meta.description: Demo data for the Japanese immersion tracker. Dates are specified as days_ago offsets — the migration script converts these to actual dates so re-running always produces 'current' data.

titles.name: カードキャプターさくら
titles.notes: Started as a beginner — slow pace, clear pronunciation.

titles.name: からかい上手の高木さん
よつばと！
titles.notes: First manga ever completed — perfect for beginners.

titles.name: キノの旅
titles.notes: First LN. Vertical text. Self-contained chapters help with comprehension.

titles.name: ノーゲーム・ノーライフ
ペルソナ4 ゴールデン
日本語の森
titles.notes: Grammar explanations in Japanese. Great for N3+.

exam_scores.notes: First mock. Listening was rough but vocab section went well.
Solid N4 pass. Ready to start prepping for N3.
First N3 attempt. Vocab is the weakest area — need more reading.
Huge improvement across all sections. Confident for the official N3 exam.

milestones.title: First manga finished: よつばと！ Vol. 1
milestones.notes: First manga read entirely in Japanese. Took 3 months.

milestones.title: Passed N5 mock exam
milestones.notes: Got 64% overall on first mock. Listening still weak.

milestones.title: First light novel started: キノの旅
milestones.notes: Slow going at first — looking up many words per page.

milestones.title: Finished カードキャプターさくら (70 episodes)
